name: Silver Palate Apple Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Apples, coarse chunks (peeled and cored)
3 tablespoons Calvados (apple brandy) or Apple cider
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a large bowl, beat vegetable oil and sugar until thick and opaque.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Sift together all-purpose flour, ground cloves, ground cinnamon, ground mace, baking soda, and salt. Stir in whole wheat flour.
5. Add the mixture to the oil mixture and blend.
6. Stir in chopped walnuts, apple chunks, and Calvados (or Apple cider).
7. Pour batter into a greased 10-inch round cake pan.
8. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Let the cake rest for 10 minutes before unmolding.
10. Pour glaze over warm cake or cut slices and pour glaze over them.
